    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    OGL20Graphics.attachProgramShaders(OGLProgram program, OGLProgramShader... shaders)
    Attaches a shader to a program.
    void
    OGL20Graphics.destroyProgramShader(OGLProgramShader shader)
    Destroys a program shader.
    void
    OGL20Graphics.detachProgramShaders(OGLProgram program, OGLProgramShader... shaders)
    Detaches a shader from a program.
